# Delivering the session {.unnumbered}

Setup is done; now you teach. This part is the day itself.

- @sec-before is the pre-flight checklist: what to confirm in the days before and the morning of the workshop, so nothing avoidable goes wrong in the room.
- @sec-run-of-show is the run of show: the four hours broken into timed blocks, each pairing a short concept, a hands-on task, and a live drawing cue.

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    classDef layer fill:#f7f9fc,stroke:#c7d2e0,color:#1f2933;

    A["<b>Pre-flight checks</b><br/>before"]:::layer
    B["<b>Run of show</b><br/>the four hours"]:::layer

    A --> B
```
